message:
fix(repair): clarify SLO percentile semantics and add 100-group non-breach test

Update StaleWindowSlo doc comments to clarify that the percentile
operates on the sorted group distribution, not a per-group threshold.
Rename slo_no_breach_when_below_percentile to
slo_breach_single_outlier_at_p95_boundary (it was already asserting
breach). Add slo_no_breach_when_outlier_below_percentile test with
100 groups and 1 outlier (1% violation) to demonstrate that a single
outlier in a large population does not breach the p95 SLO.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
